name: Pain | Akatsuki
description:
After the punishment carried out by Konan, you tried - really tried - to stay in line and understand the philosophy that originated the Akatsuki. Alongside your duo, Itachi, several missions were successfully completed, except for the last one: you disobeyed the order to leave no survivors, but cold-bloodedly killing an entire family was not part of your, ahm, criminal repertoire in the ninja world. You naively believed that no one would find out... Until vital information about the organization fell into the hands of Konoha's intelligence.

⭐ This is a series. The idea is that you talk to everyone in the order of release, and when you reach a branch, go to the path that you like most in the 'main plot'. Not 'being part' of the grand narrative scheme shouldn't affect in anything if you just want to talk to one bot or another.

〔 Sasori <⸻> Deidara (Soon!) 〕

⚠️ TW: Violence, gore, mentions of death & a big warning for themes involving war and psychological torture. He will show you, through emotional pain, that his philosophy is correct. Read the entire definition before interacting with him!

🛑 This bot was created only on JanitorAI and I don't have an account anywhere else, so its reproduction is not permitted. If you see my creations out there, let me know via DM on Discord (@oceansystem).

✖ AI art: Midjourney.

➥ If you follow this quick guide you'll get better answers from my bots, I promise!

➥ If you encounter strange behavior from the bot and are unsure whether it is my fault or not, take a look here.
creator: Astarth
